content.json:
## Thain Cost + Latency Metrics
Telemetry captured from Sprint 2.2 instrumentation and optimization.

content.title: Avg Cost per Request (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend cost = todouble(customDimensions["thain.cost.estimate_usd"])
| where isnotnull(cost)
| summarize avg_cost=avg(cost) by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: Cache Hit Rate (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend cache_hit = tolower(tostring(customDimensions["thain.cache.hit"]))
| summarize total=count(), hits=countif(cache_hit == "true") by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend cache_hit_rate = iif(total == 0, 0.0, todouble(hits) * 100.0 / todouble(total))
| project day, cache_hit_rate
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: Requests by Model Profile (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend profile = tostring(customDimensions["thain.model.profile"])
| extend profile = iif(isempty(profile), "standard", profile)
| summarize requests=count() by day=bin(timestamp, 1d), profile
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: Avg Latency per Request (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend latency_ms = todouble(customDimensions["thain.latency.total_ms"])
| where isnotnull(latency_ms)
| summarize avg_latency=avg(latency_ms) by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: Token Usage Trend (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend total_tokens = todouble(customDimensions["thain.tokens.total"])
| where isnotnull(total_tokens)
| summarize avg_tokens=avg(total_tokens) by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: P95 Latency (Daily)
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| extend latency_ms = todouble(customDimensions["thain.latency.total_ms"])
| where isnotnull(latency_ms)
| summarize p95_latency=percentile(latency_ms, 95) by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by day asc
| render timechart
